amplify.domain.subdomainsetting.CfnAbout: The SubDomainSetting property type enables you to connect a subdomain (for example, example.exampledomain.com) to a specific branch.

amplify.domain.subdomainsetting.BranchNa.Description: The branch name setting for the subdomain.

amplify.domain.subdomainsetting.Prefix.Description: The prefix setting for the subdomain.
